sections.paragraph:
- Original: πότερον

- Transliteration: Poteron

- Phonetic: pot'-er-on

- Definition:

1. which of two

- Origin: neuter of a comparative of the base of G4226

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Conjunction

- Strong's: Neuter of a comparative of the base of G4226; interrogitive as adverb which (of two) that is is it this or that: - whether.
